# freeipa_role (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA Role.

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role (cn).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the role.
- `description` (String) Description of the role.
- `privileges` (Set of String) Set of privileges associated with this role.
- `users` (Set of String) Set of usernames associated with this role.
- `groups` (Set of String) Set of group names associated with this role.
- `hosts` (Set of String) Set of host FQDNs associated with this role.
- `host_groups` (Set of String) Set of hostgroups associated with this role.
